nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I try and get it to think about 'out of the box' things

nodes.label: AI as marketing content generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as irrelevant or low-quality suggestion provider
nodes.grounding_span: I also like to get feedback from AI on my listings and what kind of better tags I could implement for better SEO

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I like to collaborate for sure. It rarely gets it right on the first try, so I have to tailor it a bit

nodes.label: Human control over creative decisions
nodes.grounding_span: I like to do the actual designing of my listing photos and the transfers themselves, even though I could technically let an AI do it

nodes.label: AI as quality enhancer and time saver
nodes.label_negative: Overutilization of AI leading to low quality
nodes.grounding_span: There are some people who over utilize AI to an extent where the product is very low quality

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: I just don't think AI is capable of producing the same quality of work that I am

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: It helps me with brainstorming too

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: For the most part I would say I end up satisfied with what it comes up with

nodes.label: Frustration with obvious suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: Maybe when it was giving me a bunch of simple, obvious ideas that I already have

nodes.label: Positive acceptance of AI for business tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I think most people see nothing wrong with using AI as a tool, like I do, to better my shop

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I like to do the actual designing of my listing photos and the transfers themselves

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I like to collaborate for sure. It rarely gets it right on the first try, so I have to tailor it a bit

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting — separates creative from non-creative tasks
